samples:
I'm dying to see you
I want your love, I need it
You know just what to do for me


When the time is right and everything comes naturally
The best feeling in life is when two become one
All of this is fleeting so embrace it while you can
It will fade away tomorrow as sure as death or taxes are


We all die, we all die
There isn't anything that can save us now
We are born into a cage of flesh and bone and blood and
Blood and bones and blood
And we're all gonna die eventually


One of these days they will take me out from under
Put me back inside my coffin like they told me to
Well, I guess there ain't no hope but I don't really care
I've been thinking 'bout the end long before the start of fear

So let me live forever here beneath the soil
As the sun comes down on me, oh-oh
I pray, I pray someone will take me out and bury me

In a perfect world, in a perfect time
You could say goodbye and I would wish you well
There was no one there who wanted to see you
And I am the only one left here for you


But when I hold your head upon my knee
I think of all the times we nearly died
Of how close we came but never did to leave this place
And it makes me wonder where you'll go now?


I want you back


When will I ever hear those words again?
That special way you have of looking at me
Is that so soon? Is that right now? How could I forget
How much I needed you before?


Well, then just take these lifeless hands
Take these broken bodies as they lie beside you
Take this heart beneath them which beats solely for you
This blood that runs from fingers down to your feet




It's not enough
If I can't be the one to hold you
So why don't you turn around
Just to look at me, please?

I wanna feel your breath on my neck
I wanna kiss your lips, whisper "I love you"


I want you back

The soul inside the body
Drags it down below


I'm floating in a sea of chaos
Trying to find my way back home


In another place and time, I was told to follow this one
To rise above myself, you know, but how? When? Where?
You know I need your guidance now


Floating in a sea of chaos
Searching for what will make me whole
There is something that can heal me
And lift me out of this hole


My spirit leads me on an upward course
Through the storm-tossed sea to shore
When I climb upon these waves of change
I know there are wonders waiting over there
If only I could see them now


Lift me up and take me away from here
Up where you belong
Out of the water, out of the river, through the open sky


Into the light, into the sun, into heaven
Where all souls become one


Lift me up and take me away from here
Up where you belong
Out of the water, out of the river, through the open sky
Soar through the air, move across the sky, reach up high


Oh, oh, oh, oh

Here we are again
I see you there
You think you're a lion
And your eyes don't know anything


What you want to do? We all know what it is
We all know exactly what it is
Eat, drink, and fuck as many times as possible
Then get back up like nothing happened before


Stare into the distance
It might change you someday
So long my old friend
Maybe soon you will play with me




If I could go anywhere in the world right now
If I could be anything and anyone I want to
There would be no time but now, there'd be no place but here
No place in all the world that can compare to being here



Open wide, let yourself bleed out
Let yourself die down deep inside of you


The more you try to control something
The less power you have over it
Just let things happen
Don't they always work out better that way?


Take this wild animal
And bring him under control
But how much longer
Before he breaks free from his leash of control?

I'm in the mirror staring at myself
What I see is just a stranger now
And it's not you, but this other one
Don't want to believe that we can't come through


All of these people telling me things they know nothing about
They said your light would never fade away so I must have some proof
You told me you were always gonna be there for me
But when I called, "Where are you?" you told me you had work to do


Well, if only faith was everything and nothing else then life would be easy
If all we did was trust without having any evidence
I think too much, I want something more than what I feel
My heart wants to keep on feeling alive until my last breath
'Cause if all our lives didn't change with every step we take then we'd just stay right where we are
But as we move around there's a part of us that cannot follow
A question we can never answer until we die


As time goes by, people fade away
Just like tears, but the pain remains
We will hold them forever in our memory
We will remember them allways



People tellin' me things they know nothing about
People tellin' me lies that they should know better
Said the light would never fade away so I must have some proof
But you won't even speak to me because I've spoken too soon

The end is near, and
No one told me
Of the trials I would face
On my way to where I've been told


I have not come from a different place
But I am now in another time
It has not always been so cold before
And it has never been so bright




Now you are coming home to stay with us
You won't be leaving anytime soon
You have not always been alone before
You will be here forever now







There was no question of what could or should be done
It had happened and there was nothing we could do
Nothing to say but "Welcome home"






To those who were born into this reality
Know that your lives will now become a part of history
They will never have to go back again
Just remember how they died for your good



You have not always been alone before
And you will never leave this place
You are one with our Father now
And you are one with his will

If I might suggest, if you would be so kind
We gather here tonight, we're holding hands and singing songs
We are the water, life is a river
We are the wind and the sky, this place where there was none before


Water and wind are whispering to me now as they flow
And their words go through me like an ocean wave in motion
Calling out from a place beneath me down within my bones
Please forgive me but it seems I'm growing cold


I know I told myself one time that water isn't alive
But I am coming 'round again, I see him for who he is


So please accept our offering of light and love and hope
Let us honor your memory with these gifts we share
The ones who came before us did what they could to heal the broken ground
Now it's our turn to tend the garden, let us all begin again


Water and wind are whispering to me now as they flow
And their words go through me like an ocean wave in motion
Calling out from a place beneath me down within my bones
Please forgive me but it seems I'm growing cold

I'm like a ghost that has no one to see
Drags me down and pulls me through
Takes my time, takes my will, kills me with his
Silence is a whisper in my ear


He has eyes that burn holes through walls
Eyes that pierce through all I hold so dear
And he speaks of life but we both know better than this


Blood red demon from the depths below
Tearing flesh until there's nothing left
But what did I ever do to you? You are a bastard, so
Bury your ugly little head deep under


You were never here at all
Why don't you just go fuck yourself?
This thing I feel for you Is dead inside me now
Don't judge me guilty if you want or need to
Just treat me as I am



It drags me down and pulls me through
Sucks the blood right out of me
Takes my time, takes my will, kills me with his
Silence is a whisper in my ear

I've been thinking about you since the day we met
Now it feels so right to be here with you again


The way that you are, and everything you say
Feels like an open door, a million miles away
And I want this more than just about anything
There is something about you, I can't deny

Something about you
Don't know how long I'll stay but
I do know that I'm coming home soon
Mhm mhm mmhm

Another round of loving followed by a kiss
Then there will come a time when we have to let you go
And I know that you won't mind letting me leave
It's what my soul needs, it's where I wanna be



Something about you
Don't know how long I'll stay but
I do know that I'm coming home soon
Mhm mhm mmhm
Mhm mhm mmhm


When I see your face
My heart starts beating faster
Oh I hear your voice
My blood starts flowing faster

What you reap is what you sow
The seed was planted long ago
If there's no faith then we will fall
There's only one who can deliver hope


Rise up, rise above it all
Rise above it all
It's time to fly away and open your wings
Open your mind so that your heart may sing
Soar through the wind as I cry
And take this sorrow far away from me
I pray for rain and healing
To wash away our pain and everything
That keeps us down and kills a part of us
Soar beyond this place where angels fear to tread
On eagles' backs in the clouds I'll ride
As they whisper stories told by one alone
And they whisper tales of love untold
A love like none before us


In my soul I hear
One strong voice calling
"Why don't you come? We need you here"
I am on my way
This moment strikes a chord inside of me
Reaching out a hand
Saying "come to see me now"
You are not alone, just like me
Like me you must learn to trust in something greater than yourself


Take this sorrow far away from me
I pray for rain and healing
To wash away our pain and everything
That keeps us down and kills a part of us
Soar beyond this place where angels fear to tread
On eagles' backs in the clouds I'll ride
As they whisper stories told by one alone
They whisper tales of love untold
A love like none before us
